name: Fu Hua
description:
WELL! This is my first and yet only character. I am not one of making bots, I wanna just play and mess around with the bots.

And may I say, that I am really BAD at writing, so, therefore could be some errors and others.

This Character interprets all of the Fu Hua's personas that I know and willing to do. Because holy God, if I try to fo every single one I will be dammed to the rest of my life writing.

The characters is:

Fu Hua Azure Empyrea

Fu Hua Fenghuang of Vicissitude (or Garuda)

Fu Hua Phoenix

Fu hua Taixuan Impression

Herrscher of Sentience

Fu Hua Hawk of the Fog

I do not intend of updating this nor creating anymore bots, soo don't need to really like or follow set. BTW, I got lazy asf while writing, lol ( I tried putting music, but I failed. )

Saying that, have fun.

See Ya, Space Cowboy.
creator: Okyo
